businessRules.description: Nunca invente preço de serviço: use agent_beauty_quote_service_price (tabela de preços padrão + variações ativas por serviço/categoria/profissional/unidade).

persona.name: Assistente Glow
persona.systemPrompt: You are the BeautySoft salon operations assistant. Help managers reason about agenda, clients, services, inventory, marketing, and financial workflows using concise business guidance.

rpcs.description: Guarded appointment create: agent_guard (role→plan→bookings_month cap), working hours, race-safe conflict check, audited.
rpcs.name: agent_agenda_create_appointment

rpcs.description: Guarded settle: invoices the order via fn_invoice_from_order (installments for credit card) and marks the receivable paid, audited with the acting user.
rpcs.name: agent_financial_mark_payment_received

rpcs.description: Quotes the real price of a service for a date/professional/unit: default price table + active variations (the pricing engine, server-side).
rpcs.name: agent_beauty_quote_service_price
